categories.module: I-Series / E-Series / S-Series / A-Series / B-Series / C-Series / D-Series / EVX modules
categories.gate: 5-Gate system (PolicyGate, ApprovalGate, CostGate, EvidenceGate, SelfCheckGate), CL-G0~G4, SDAR gates, 51% Gate
categories.status_code: ORANGE CORE 9-State, UI 9-State, SDAR 7-State, AR Levels, Breaking Event classifications
categories.tech_stack: Languages, frameworks, databases, tools, and libraries
categories.other: Schemas, concepts, systems, architectural constraints, protocols

notes: 81 total modules across 8 series (I:25, E:16, S:8, A:7, B:6, C:7, D:6, EVX:6). Not all are individually listed here; only those with explicit definitions or significant appearances in the document are included as separate term entries.

The document defines 5 distinct Gate systems: VAMOS 5-Gate (Policy/Approval/Cost/Evidence/SelfCheck), Cloud Library 5-Gate (CL-G0~CL-G4), SDAR 5-Gate (Safety/Risk/Cost/Approval/Verification), 51% Gate (AI Investing), and LangGraph 5-Phase pipeline gates.
3 state machines are defined: ORANGE CORE 9-State (S0-S8), UI 9-State (UI_S0-UI_S8), SDAR 7-State (IDLE through ESCALATED).
17 LOCK-AT architecture constraints (LOCK-AT-001 through LOCK-AT-017) govern Agent Teams behavior.
25 Pydantic v2 schemas are defined in V0-STEP-2, with DecisionSchema (18 fields, FREEZE) and ResponseEnvelope (5 fields, LOCK) being the most critical.
EventTypeRegistry has 123 items, FailureCodeRegistry has 36 items, FallbackRegistry has 23 items.
Cost limits: V1=40,000 KRW/month, V2=93,000 KRW/month, V3=266,000 KRW/month (all LOCK).
RT-BNP operates across 4 tiers: T1 (<10s, WebSocket, V3), T2 (<60s, REST API, V2), T3 (<300s, RSS, V1), T4 (<600s, Social API, V2).
DCL has 3 channels: DCL-FIN (finance), DCL-TECH (technology), DCL-GEO (geopolitics).
SDAR AR levels: AR-L0 (monitoring only), AR-L1 (notifications), AR-L2 (LOW risk auto-repair, 5 actions), AR-L3 (MEDIUM risk, 5 actions), AR-L4 (HIGH risk, 4 actions).
